text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our second summer camp is here. Smart Falcon
changes into her swimsuit straightaway, eager to
get started.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Recently, the nickname "Silence Suzuka of the
Sand" has been gaining popularity among fans.
She vows to do the name justice by getting even
stronger.
